title: How Stripe Capital for platforms works
excerpt: Learn the basics about Stripe Capital for platforms. > Capital for platforms is available in [public preview](https://docs.stripe.com/release-phases.md). Stripe Capital for platforms works differently by country. Capital for platforms is only available in the United States (US) and United Kingdom (GB). Select your country to learn how Capital works: Before you use Stripe Capital for platforms, learn about the eligibility requirements, lending process, and the structure of financing offers. To use Capital for platforms, your business must be a *Connect* (Connect is Stripe's solution for multi-party businesses, such as marketplace or software platforms, to route payments between sellers, customers, and other recipients) platform with eligible connected accounts.
